ops.title: Cache heal mutex can block auth_status past its bound
ops.description: healingWrapper.heal (internal/cache/cache.go:203) holds a non-ctx-aware sync.Mutex across the helper subprocess; a heal running concurrently with a status read can block Get/Degraded past authStatusTimeout (context.WithTimeout cannot interrupt a mutex Lock). Needs cache/heal locking restructure (e.g. TryLock + locked-note fallback, or ctx-aware semaphore). Found during the v0.10.3 auth_status fix; not the observed incident (that fired on every doctor run; this needs a coincident slow heal while degraded+locked).

ops.text: auth_status returns within authStatusTimeout even while a heal is mid-flight (test with a slow fake helper)
